claim_boundary: Static Rust source inventory only: records PyO3 kernel execution-mode evidence tokens for scalar/unknown, ndarray dot, rayon-threaded, and explicit SIMD paths. It is not an isolated benchmark, throughput claim, compiler-vectorization proof, or CPU-affinity artefact.

kernel_records.claim_boundary: Execution-mode evidence only. Promotion of speedup or production performance claims requires separate isolated_affinity benchmark artefacts.
